attendance.banner_body: Attendance should preferably be recorded through the Activity Report. This page is intended only for corrections, retifications and extraordinary cases.

documents.title: Documents & Reports
documents.subtitle: Unified hub for exports and official documents
documents.management_restricted: Available only to coordination and super admin.

callout.institution_body: These details appear on all official documents, reports and exports. The Operational Milestone defines the cutoff date for analytical metrics — changing it recalculates dashboard KPIs, ELO and adherence. Coordination only.
callout.neighborhoods_body: Targets feed the coverage dashboard per neighborhood and Active Search. Update whenever the agreement changes. Values are audited.
callout.transport_body: Inactive points do not appear to drivers or the family portal, but keep history for previous reports. Prefer deactivating instead of deleting when the point has already been used.
callout.team_body: Edits here change sensitive data (salary, workload, status). Every change is logged in audit. Dismissals are reversible via functional history.
callout.permissions_body: Changing permissions can immediately block staff access. Coordination and super admin only. Changes take effect on the affected user's next page load.
callout.audit_body: Immutable record of all sensitive actions (creation, edition, deletion and justifications). Use it for accountability, LGPD and internal investigations. Export by period before monthly closings.
callout.system_body: Advanced area: document templates, database backup and technical tools. Backup operations can be heavy — run outside peak hours. Coordination and super admin only.
